body:
## Parent PRD

#4

## What to build

Build FloatingChatWidget with open/close states, auto-open-on-first-visit behavior, visible header/actions, desktop fixed-size layout, and mobile bottom-sheet behavior, powered by ChatShell with file upload disabled.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Render floating button and toggled chat window states
- [ ] Auto-open chat on first render and allow minimize/close
- [ ] Embed ChatMessageList and ChatInput wired to ChatShell
- [ ] Desktop and mobile layouts match agreed dimensions/behavior
- [ ] Build succeeds for InterviewCoach.slnx

## Blocked by

- Blocked by #5

## User stories addressed

- User story 3
- User story 4
title: Slice 2: Build floating mini-chat widget component
